div.p: GPU timing visualization across distributed training clusters
Trigger: Mean > 1.5× Median Observation Window: 10 Steps R4 Diagnostic Data:

ol.li: Int8 Quantization: Enable for Rank 4 traffic.
Load Balancing: Reduce Micro-batch size on R4.
Thermal Management: Increase fan duty cycle on Node 4.

g.text: cluster_median = np.median([d.ms for d in window_data])
rank_mean = np.mean([d.ms for d in window_data if d.rank == rank])
